1.0.0.name: t20kdc.vrc-workarounds
1.0.0.description: Editor-only C# code working around VRChat SDK issues. Does not replace befuddledlabs's LinuxVRChatSDKPatch; should be used in addition to it. Intended to be reasonably safe to drop into a project with no other consequences than workarounds for bugs.

0.1.0.name: t20kdc.vrc-bsp
0.1.0.description: Using Quake 2 BSP compilers to build VRChat worlds.

0.1.0.name: t20kdc.vrc-tools
0.1.0.description: Editor-only C# code containing utilities for building VRChat worlds.
